en: The teacher is here.

ch: B:不要再玩了，快坐在座位上。
en: Stop playing and quickly sit in your seat.
Sorry, I’m late!
Come in quickly.
What day is it today?

ab: sinciuanga tucu a adau, yasumi nu tjuau, vaiki a kinangevang!
ch: B:今天星期五，明天放假，一起出去玩吧!
en: It’s Friday today, we have a day off tomorrow. Let’s go out and play together!
Great! Let’s go to the riverside.
What day will it be tomorrow?

ch: B:明天星期三，我們明天下午去玩球吧!
en: Tomorrow will be Wednesday. Let’s go play ball tomorrow afternoon!

ab: anema rusu kudain nu tjyau a kadjamadjaman?
en: What will you be doing tomorrow morning?

ab: nutjyau ripaitjin, aru sema tjukai amen ka tji kina.
ch: B:明天是星期日，我要和媽媽去教會。
en: Tomorrow will be Sunday, I will be going to church with my mom.
What’s wrong?

ab: valauvau aken, a ru ma binziu aken.
en: I feel like vomiting. I need to go to the restroom.
I feel dizzy.
Lie down and rest.

ab: sinsi, sae’tju sa ku tjiyalj, ma binziu aken.
ch: A:老師，我肚子痛，要去廁所。
en: Teacher, I have a stomachache. I need to go to the restroom.
Okay, go quickly.

ab: makaya ken na vaik a milima?
en: May I go wash my hands?

ab: aru patjezuanga a tja zikan, mai yanang.
en: It’s almost time for class to end. Wait a little longer.

ab: sinsi, sae’tju sa ku ulu, kiatju’ aken nu na itjau anga.
ch: A:老師，我頭好痛，下午要請假。
en: It’s almost time for class to end. Wait a little longer.

ab: uwi, kipa paulingavu a tjalju tjuma’.
en: Okay, take care and go home.

ab: sinsi, puri kiyadju’ aken nu tjaivelilj, nu siciyi aru kipucemel aken.
ch: A:老師，我下禮拜一要請假，我要去看醫生。
en: Teacher, I need to take a sick leave next Monday. I have to see a doctor.
Alright, take care of yourself.
Where is selep?

ab: sae’tju a tjiyal ni selep, vaik a ma binziu.
en: She has a stomachache. She’s in the restroom.
Where is sulja?

ab: sinsi, sae’tju a liqu ni sulja, ikana mantjez.
en: Teacher, sulja has a sore throat. She took a sick leave today.
Why didn’t remereman come?
She has a fever.
